wordplay_note: Small wisdom — the divine compressed into a two-year-old
card_description: Mini (Sophia) (meaning "Mini = small; Sophia = wisdom") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *VALIS*. Two-year-old daughter of the Lamptons who is the incarnation of divine wisdom. Name note: Small wisdom — the divine compressed into a two-year-old. God as infant — wisdom in the smallest and most vulnerable form. First appears in *VALIS*.

reference.brief: Two-year-old daughter of the Lamptons who is the incarnation of divine wisdom
reference.significance: God as infant — wisdom in the smallest and most vulnerable form
